POST.name: acceptChallenge
POST.description: Accept a challenge and hand in the solution

POST.name: changePassword
POST.description: Changes the current user's password

POST.name: createNewApiToken
POST.description: API V2 authentication Step 1: Get new API token if no valid key present
POST.metadata: Uses connection information to display it later to the user

optional.description: The alias of the tenant

GET.name: getApiTokenAuthorizationRequest
GET.description: Retrieves information about a pending authorization request
GET.metadata: Uses connection information to display it to the user

variable.description: The ID (not the key) of the API token

POST.name: apiTokenAuthorize
POST.description: API V2 authentication Step 2: Web client authorizes API key and assigns it to current user (this request is protected with a CSRF token)

variable.description: The ID (not the key) of the API token

optional.description: Expiration date and time (optional, otherwise system default will be used)

GET.name: getApiTokenInfo
GET.description: Gets the application info of an API token in use
GET.metadata: Uses connection information to identify the token in use

PUT.name: putApiTokenInfo
PUT.description: Updates the application info of an API token in use
PUT.metadata: Uses connection information to identify the token in use

POST.name: apiTokenUnauthorize
POST.description: Removes a previously authorized API token

variable.description: The ID (not the key) of the API token

optional.description: The user id if not token of logged in user

GET.name: getAuthorizedApiTokens
GET.description: Returns API tokens authorized by current (or specified) user

optional.description: The user id if not token of logged in user

GET.name: getAuthorizedApiToken
GET.description: Returns an API token authorized by current (or specified) user

variable.description: The ID (not the key) of the API token

optional.description: The user id if not token of logged in user

GET.name: getAuthenticationState
GET.description: Returns information about the current authentication state

GET.name: getAuthorizationByPerm
GET.description: Returns the current user's authorization for a given permission

GET.name: getAuthorizationByObj
GET.description: Returns the current user's authorizations for a transition or an action on a given object

optional.description: The action to be performed (specify either action or transition)
The transition to be performed (specify either action or transition)

GET.name: getAuthorizationsByObj
GET.description: Returns the current user's authorizations for a transition or an action on a given object

GET.name: getCreateAuthorizationByObj
GET.description: Returns the current user's authorizations for creating a sub object on a given object

GET.name: getCurrentUserReceiveNotifications
GET.description: Returns the current user's flag whether to receive notifications by e-mail

PUT.name: putCurrentUserReceiveNotifications
PUT.description: Sets the current user's flag whether to receive notifications by e-mail

GET.name: getChallenge
GET.description: Gets the challenge to be solved for successful login (i.e., setting a new password or second factor auth)

GET.name: getConfidentiality
GET.description: Determine whether object is confidential

PUT.name: putConfidentiality
PUT.description: Determine whether object is confidential

GET.name: getCurrentUser

The user's timezone (will be included into login URL)

GET.name: getFirstFactorAuthority

optional.description: The language for communication (will be included into login URL)
The user's timezone (will be included into login URL)

the key size to use
the point in time of expiry

GET.name: getCurrentUserRelations

Optional filtering by target id (needs also targetType)

username of the user that likes to reset his/her password (must either specify username or email)
The language for communicating

The language for communicating

GET.name: getPermissions

GET.description: Returns a permission graph that describes the inheritance between permissions (directed acyclic graph)

optional.description: Show graph for a given type with cube

optional.description: add a remark

POST.description: Apporoves a resource allocation (move to state APPROVED in resource allocation workflow)

optional.description: add a remark

datacontract.name: ApiClientInfo
datacontract.description: Describes an API client

member.name: application
member.description: The name of the application that wants to access PQFORCE

member.name: appVersion
member.description: The version of the application that wants to access PQFORCE

member.name: appCompany
member.description: The company that is responsible for the development of the application

datacontract.name: ApiTokenAuthorizationRequest
datacontract.description: Contains information about an API token that is requested to be authorized

member.name: tokenId
member.description: The ID of the token that was created

member.name: clientInfoProvided
member.description: The information about the software that was provided

member.name: requestedFromAddress
member.description: The address of the machine that requested a new API token

member.name: yourAddress
member.description: The address of the machine that is doing the current request as seen by the server for comparison

member.name: requestedAt
member.description: The point in time when the token was requested

datacontract.name: ApiTokenLog
datacontract.description: Contains information about an API token that is authorized

member.name: clientInfoProvided
member.description: The information about the software that was provided

member.name: authorizedAt
member.description: The point in time when the token was authorized

member.name: lastAccessAddress
member.description: The address from which the token was last used

member.name: lastAccessAt
member.description: The last time the toked was used

member.name: expiry
member.description: The point in time when the token expires

datacontract.name: ApiTokenWithAuthUrl
datacontract.description: Contains the secret token and the URL to be called with the browser to authorize the API client for PQFORCE access

member.name: apiToken
member.description: The secret token to access the PQFORCE API

member.name: authorizationUrl
member.description: This URL must be shown in the browser to follow the steps to authorize the API client for PQFORCE access

member.name: authorizationDeadline
member.description: The point in time when the authorization process must be finished

datacontract.name: AuthenticationState
datacontract.description: Contains information about the authentication state of the current session

member.name: tenant
member.description: true, if tenant is konown

member.name: preAuthenticated
member.description: true, if user was specified, but not yet authenticated

member.name: fullyAuthenticated
member.description: true, if user was specified and fully authenticated

datacontract.name: Challenge
datacontract.description: Describes a challenge that has to be fulfilled by user logging in

member.name: challengeText
member.description: Contains the task to perform for solving the challenge in the user's language

simpleType.example: Please scan the barcode with the second factor app and enter the code

member.name: challengeImageUrl
member.description: An image (i.e.) a barcode to be shown

member.name: challengeType
member.description: The type of challenge

member.name: challengeRegex
member.description: Describes the rules for the answer to be entered

member.name: challengeHint
member.description: A hint that describes the format of the answer (corresponding to the Regex)

datacontract.name: ChallengeAnswer
datacontract.description: The answer to a challenge

member.name: answer
member.description: The answer that was entered by the user

enumcontract.name: ChallengeType
enumcontract.description: The kind of challenge to be fulfilled

value.description: A simple answer from the user is expected
The user has to do something on a different channel
The user has to change his/her password

datacontract.name: ChangePassword

member.name: oldpassword
member.description: The old password

member.name: newpassword
member.description: The new password

member.name: confidentiality

member.description: The different mappings for transitions that are possible starting from given state

datacontract.name: Saml2IdentityProvider
datacontract.description: Contains all necessary information for using an external identity provider (IDP) with SAML protocol

member.name: primaryCertificateFingerprint
member.description: The fingerprint (SHA 256 hash in hex format) of the customer's identity provider's primary certificate (spaces between groups are optional)

member.name: secondaryCertificateFingerprint
member.description: A secondary (spare) fingerprint (SHA 256 hash in hex format) of an optional customer's identity provider's secondary/spare certificate (spaces between groups are optional)

member.name: signInUrl
member.description: The URL that is used by the customer's identity provider to sign in

member.name: signOutUrl
member.description: The URL that is used by the customer's identity provider to sign out (not yet in use)

member.name: eMailField
member.description: Where to find eMail in the customer's identity provider's response

member.name: userIdField
member.description: Where to find the user ID in the customer's identity provider's response

member.name: realNameField
member.description: Where to find real name in the customer's identity provider's response (not yet in use)

member.name: mobileNumberField
member.description: Where to find the mobile number in the customer's identity provider's response

member.name: groupsField
member.description: Where to find group information in the customer's identity provider's response

member.name: userRoleMapping
member.description: The mappings of user roles: user role --> required group.

member.name: issuerUrl
member.description: Informational (read-only) for the admin: The issuer URL to be configured in the customer's identity provider

member.name: assertionConsumerServiceUrl
member.description: Informational (read-only) for the admin: The ACS URL to be configured in the customer's identity provider

member.name: directLoginUrl
member.description: Informational (read-only) for the admin: The direct login URL

member.name: secondAuthorityDefault
member.description: The default second authority (2nd factor) for new users that are created automatically

member.name: receiveNotificationsDefault
member.description: The default notification setting for new users that are created automatically

member.name: logAssertions
member.description: Enables or disables the logging of assertions for debug / config purpose

member.name: allowInsecureSignatureAlgorithm
member.description: Maintains compatibility to some outdated, insecure SAML2 identity providers. Make sure to update or reconfigure your identity provider for the usage of a secure algorithm.

member.name: logs
member.description: Contains logs about the last few login attempts with the customer's identity provider for the system admin (read-only)

member.name: signRequest
member.description: Specifies whether to sign the requests

member.name: sendAcsUrl
member.description: Specifies whether to send the ACS URL with the request (request needs also to be signed, if true)

member.name: tenantSpecificIssuer
member.description: Uses a tenant specific issuer URL to distinguish different tenants on the same system

member.name: requestPersistentId
member.description: Whether to explicitly request a persistent ID (recommended, disable only for compatibility reasons)

member.name: certificateInfo
member.description: Contains information about the signing certificate, if signing is enabled (read-only)

datacontract.name: Saml2UserRoleMapping
datacontract.description: Describes a mapping between a PQFORCE user role and any required external group (i.e. AD group). If group is null, all users will be assigned to that user role

member.name: userRoleId
member.description: The ID of the user role in PQFORCE

member.name: mode
member.description: Describes the way PQFORCE assigns the mentioned user role to a user with given IdP groups

member.name: group
member.description: The name of the external group (i.e. AD group)

enumcontract.name: Saml2UserRoleMappingMode
enumcontract.description: Describes the way PQFORCE assigns a user role to a user with given IdP groups

value.description: Lets the PQFORCE administrator enable this role individually, independent of any IdP
Assigns the user role if and only if the user belongs to the given IdP group

datacontract.name: AddUrlArg

member.description: URL for POST to add a new item, format as in routes file, always starts with '/'. May contain the following placeholders: - :type and :id of current item - :linktype and :forward of this link - :argtype and :argid of dropped or selected object - :origintype and :originid of dropped or selected object

member.name: behaviour
member.description: specifies the behaviour of ADD URL with ARG

member.name: argumentTypes
member.description: list of item types allowed as arguments

member.name: argumentUrl
member.description: URL for GET to query arguments, format as in routes file, always starts with '/'. May contain the following placeholders: - :type and :id of current item - :linktype and :forward of this link - :argtype (a value from argumentTypes)

member.name: dropPriority
member.description: If dropping onto an item with multiple link types matching criteria: Choose the one with highest prio (the lowest number)

member.name: allowOriginObject
member.description: true, if dropping into same object is allowed

member.name: allowOriginLinkType
member.description: true, if dropping into same link group is allowed

enumcontract.name: AddUrlArgBehaviour

datacontract.name: DeleteUrl

member.name: behaviour

enumcontract.name: DeleteUrlBehaviour

value.description: The object and any dependent objects will be deleted

datacontract.name: Jtf
datacontract.description: The JSON table format defined by Client Team to support dynamic table visualization on client

member.name: mimeType
member.description: must be "application/x.pqf.table.json"

member.name: type
member.description: Identifier for the table structure defined in the meta section. Documents with identical table structure should have the same type. User settings like sort or filter will be stored per type.

member.name: id
member.description: An identification of the document (optional)

member.name: code
member.description: Visualized type name of the document (optional, localized)

member.name: name
member.description: Name of the document (localized)

json.example: { "en": "Projects of Portfolio ABC", "de": "Projekte im Portfolio ABC" }

member.name: description
member.description: Description of the document visualized as hint (optional, localized)

member.name: iconRef
member.description: Icon for the document (optional, localized)

member.name: color
member.description: Color for the document (optional, localized)

member.name: createdAt
member.description: Timestamp of the document creation (optional, ISO formatted, UTC)

member.name: createdBy
member.description: Name of the creator (optional)

member.name: meta
member.description: Meta data

member.name: data
member.description: The table content is based on an array of rows. id: Row ID (optional), style: Object of CSS styling for this column (optional), data; Array of values according to the type in the column definitions. It is possible to reduce the row data to the array of values.

json.example: [{"id":"P1","style":{"backgroundColor":"#F002","fontWeight":"bold"},"data":["Project One","Description of Project One","2024-01-01",250,{"id":"RES1","name":"Peter Muster","description":"I'm Peter","iconRef":"mdi:account-circle","color":"#080"}]},["Project Two","Description of Project Two","2024-07-01",120,"Hans Meier"]]

member.name: hints
member.description: Hints is an array of information that can be displayed on top of the grid or charts. The items of the array are either directly html formatted strings (shown as type info and without a label), or objects

json.example: ["This is an information.", { "type": "warn", "label": "WARNING", "text": { "en": "And this is a warning.", "de": "Und dies ist eine Warnung." } }]

datacontract.name: JtfWithCharts
datacontract.description: The JSON table format defined by Client Team to support dynamic table and chart visualization on client

member.name: charts
member.description: The Json Documents intended for the Table Viewer can be expanded with Charts Definitions. Currently, we support line-, bar-, stackedbar-, pie- and donut-charts.

member.name: initialChart
member.description: defines the id of the initially shown chart

datacontract.name: JtfChart
datacontract.description: Chart definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: id
member.description: An identification of the chart (optional)

member.name: name
member.description: Name of the Chart. Will be shown in the Tab. (optional)

member.name: description
member.description: Description of the chart visualized as hint (optional, localized)

member.name: iconRef
member.description: Icon for the chart (optional, localized)

member.name: color
member.description: Color for the chart (optional, localized)

member.name: hidden
member.description: Hides the chart

member.name: type
member.description: Type of the Chart

member.name: baseline
member.description: Data represented on the x-axis (in case of "line", "bar" and "stackedbar") or the data for the names/groups of the slices (in case of "pie", "donut")

member.name: datasets
member.description: Data represented along the y-axis. Multiple Datasets possible for "line","bar" and "stackedbar". Think of it as multiple lines, bars.

member.name: axis
member.description: Axis options

member.name: showLegend
member.description: Whether to show legend or not

datacontract.name: JtfChartAxis
datacontract.description: Chart axis definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: showAxisName
member.description: Declares whether the names of the axis' are shown. Is ignored for "pie" and "donut" charts

member.name: x
member.description: Considers the x-axis

member.name: y
member.description: Considers the y-axis

datacontract.name: JtfChartAxisOptions
datacontract.description: Chart axis options definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: name
member.description: Name of the axis. Can provide options for different languages.

member.name: unit
member.description: Unit will be added at the end of the Axis-Name

datacontract.name: JtfChartBaseline
datacontract.description: Chart baseline definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: id
member.description: An identification of the column. Must match the id of a column defined in the columns section of the document

member.name: name
member.description: Name of the column. Must not necessarily match the name of the column in the columns section. Will be shown in the "tip" (when hovering over the data in the chart)

member.name: description
member.description: Description of the chart baseline visualized as hint (optional, localized)

member.name: type
member.description: Type of the data

member.name: format
member.description: Format data depending on type

datacontract.name: JtfChartDataFormat
datacontract.description: Chart format definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: format
member.description: In case of the type of the data being "date" or "daterange", one can use the attribute "format" (String) to define how the date should be shown. The options from the moment.js library are supported.

member.name: decimal
member.description: In case of the type of the data being "number", one can use the attribute "decimal" (Number) to declare the number of decimal points that are shown.

member.name: startAndEnd
member.description: This is an unknown member which exists in the sample code

datacontract.name: JtfChartDataset
datacontract.description: Chart dataset definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: id
member.description: An identification of the column. Must match the id of a column defined in the columns section of the document.

member.name: name
member.description: Name of the column. Must not necessarily match the name of the column in the columns section. Will be shown in the "tip" (when hovering over the data in the chart)

member.name: description
member.description: Description of the chart dataset visualized as hint (optional, localized)

member.name: type
member.description: Type of the data

member.name: color
member.description: Color of a dataset

member.name: aggregation
member.description: Data aggregation

member.name: unit
member.description: Unit of the data. Will be shown in the "tip" (when hovering over the data in the chart)

member.name: format
member.description: Format data depending on type

enumcontract.name: JtfChartDatasetAggregation
enumcontract.description: Chart dataset aggregation options for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

enumcontract.name: JtfChartDataType
enumcontract.description: Chart data type definition for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

value.description: The datatype "group" is used if the data cannot be represented on a continuous axis and there is no clear order

enumcontract.name: JtfChartType
enumcontract.description: Chart type for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

value.description: The first dataset is used as benchmark. The other datasets are visualized as stacked bar. The deviation between benchmark and the sum of the stacked bars is calculated automatically

datacontract.name: JtfMeta
datacontract.description: Metadata for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: categories
member.description: Definition of the categories grouping columns

member.name: columns
member.description: Array of column definitions

member.name: options
member.description: Options for visualization or behavior of the grid

datacontract.name: JtfMetaCategory
datacontract.description: Metadata categories for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: id
member.description: Identification of the category

member.name: label
member.description: Label of the category (localized)

datacontract.name: JtfMetaColumn
datacontract.description: Metadata columns for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: id
member.description: Identification of the column (optional)

member.name: catid
member.description: ID of the category this column is member of (optional, can be null)

member.name: type
member.description: Data type

member.name: label
member.description: Name of the column (localized)

member.name: options
member.description: Additional options (optional)

member.name: format
member.description: Formatting of data (optional, see data types)

member.name: style
member.description: Object of CSS styling for this column (optional)

enumcontract.name: JtfMetaColumnDataType
enumcontract.description: Column data types for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

value.description: ISO formatted date "2023-11-09" or date/time "2023-11-09T16:12:00Z" in UTC
ISO formatted duration string like "PT0S" or "PT4D"
Represents a list of values as a stacked bar

datacontract.name: JtfMetaColumnOptions
datacontract.description: Column options for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

member.name: width
member.description: Width of the column (optional, default 100)

member.name: fixed
member.description: Column attached at the left or right side (default, null not attached)

member.name: resizable
member.description: Column resizable (default true)

member.name: sortable
member.description: Column sortable (default true)

member.name: groupable
member.description: Column groupable (default true)

member.name: filterable
member.description: Column filterable (default true)

member.name: aggregation
member.description: Data aggregations: null: no aggregation, sum: sum up (default)

member.name: hidden
member.description: Whether column is hidden or not

enumcontract.name: JtfMetaColumnOptionsAggregation
enumcontract.description: Column aggregation options for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

enumcontract.name: JtfMetaColumnOptionsFixed
enumcontract.description: Column fixed options for the JSON table format defined by Client Team

value.description: Column attached at the left side
Column attached at the right side

member.name: name
member.description: The name of the object that should be displayed in the user's language

member.name: action

datacontract.name: PaletteColorItem
datacontract.description: A generic item with basic identifying information and validity (with palette color instead of arbitrary color)

member.name: name
member.description: The name of the object (in the user's language, if translations are available)

member.name: code
member.description: A short code which may be unique over all objects of the same type

member.name: description
member.description: A descriptive text about the object, may contain HTML

member.name: iconRef
member.description: value for HTML attribute image/@src, Examples: "/images/.../....png" for images on the server, "data:image/png;base64,[base64data]" for inline data

member.name: color
member.description: An identifier of a color

member.name: validityStart
member.description: Start (inclusive) of the validity period of the object (often null)

member.name: validityUntil
member.description: End (exclusive) of the validity period of the object (often null)

datacontract.name: Property
datacontract.description: A dynamic property of an object

member.name: key
member.description: A key identifying the property (unique per object instance)

member.name: value
member.description: The value of the dynamic property. It's syntax and semantics depend on the type.

datacontract.name: PropertyConstraint
datacontract.description: A specification of a dynamic object property

member.name: basetype
member.description: The basic data type of the dynamic property

member.name: properties
member.description: The different attributes / properties of the constraint

datacontract.name: PropertyConstraintAttribute
datacontract.description: An attribute of a property specification

member.name: key
member.description: The basic data type of the dynamic property

member.name: value
member.description: The value of the attribute

datacontract.name: PropertyDefinition
datacontract.description: A definition of dynamic a property that belongs to an object type

member.name: objectType
member.description: The type of object this property belongs to

member.name: sortIndex
member.description: The index to order the properties (the lowest first)

member.name: label
member.description: The label to be shown for that property in the user's language

member.name: identifier
member.description: An identifier that allows the users to identify the property in dropdown lists or similar cases

member.name: hint
member.description: The hint (often a tooltip) to be shown for that property in the user's language

simpleType.example: Dies ist die Projektnummer, wie sie in unserem ERP steht

member.name: constraint
member.description: The constraints (type, number formats, string lengths, ...) that apply to this property

datacontract.name: Relation
datacontract.description: Describes a relation between two objects

member.name: relationType
member.description: The type of relation (definition)

member.name: explicit
member.description: true, if this kind of relation must be set explicitly, that means it can not be derived from other data

member.name: name
member.description: A name describing the relation

member.name: source
member.description: The source part of the (directed) relation

member.name: target
member.description: The target part of the (directed) relation

datacontract.name: RelationType
datacontract.description: Describes a relation type which defines the rules of a relation

member.name: nameForward
member.description: Defines the name which describes the relation seen from the source in the user's language

member.name: nameBackward
member.description: Defines the name which describes the relation seen from the target in the user's language

member.name: description
member.description: A descriptive text about the object, may contain HTML

member.name: iconRef
member.description: value for HTML attribute image/@src, Examples: "/images/.../....png" for images on the server, "data:image/png;base64,[base64data]" for inline data

member.name: color
member.description: A color or any identifier of a color

datacontract.name: ExplicitRelationTypeTranslated
datacontract.description: Describes an explicit (configured) relation with translations

member.name: nameForward
member.description: Defines the name which describes the relation seen from the source in different languages

member.name: nameBackward
member.description: Defines the name which describes the relation seen from the target in different languages

member.name: description
member.description: A descriptive text about the object, may contain HTML in different languages

member.name: iconRef
member.description: value for HTML attribute image/@src, Examples: "/images/.../....png" for images on the server, "data:image/png;base64,[base64data]" for inline data

member.name: color
member.description: A color or any identifier of a color

member.name: sourceTypes
member.description: Defines the possible object types for the source part of the (directed) relation

member.name: sourcesUrl
member.description: Defines a URL which may be used to enumerate all possible objects for the source part of the (directed) relation

member.name: createTargetFromSourceUrl
member.description: Url that may be used to create a target and a relation at the same time given a source object (use :type and :id as placeholders for source reference)

member.name: targetTypes
member.description: Defines the possible object types for the target part of the (directed) relation

member.name: targetsUrl
member.description: Defines a URL which may be used to enumerate all possible objects for the target part of the (directed) relation

member.name: createSourceFromTargetUrl
member.description: Url that may be used to create a source and a relation at the same time given a target object (use :type and :id as placeholders for target reference)

member.name: sortIndexForward
member.description: Defines the sort index seen from the source (lowest first)

member.name: sortIndexBackward
member.description: Defines the sort index seen from the target (lowest first)

member.name: navigable
member.description: Shows the relation in the navigation

member.name: autoSet
member.description: Automatically create a relation to the user when he/she creates a new object (makes only sense, if relation may be linked to a resource)

datacontract.name: RelationTypeWithConstraints
datacontract.description: Describes a relation type which defines the rules of a relation including some rules

member.name: explicit
member.description: true, if this kind of relation must be set explicitly, that means it can not be derived from other data

member.name: sourceTypes
member.description: Defines the possible object types for the source part of the (directed) relation

member.name: targetTypes
member.description: Defines the possible object types for the target part of the (directed) relation

member.name: sourcesUrl
member.description: Defines a URL which may be used to enumerate all possible objects for the source part of the (directed) relation

member.description: Defines a URL which may be used to enumerate all possible objects for the target part of the (directed) relation

member.name: sortIndexForward

datacontract.name: SessionInfo

member.name: sessionId
member.description: The session ID of the current session (unique for each WebSocket connection)

datacontract.name: SessionMessageClientToServer
datacontract.description: This structure defines all possible messages that may be sent from client to server over WebSocket

member.name: feature
member.description: This message is sent by client to inform about features (tabs) of objects being displayed

member.name: access
member.description: This message is sent by client to inform about an object being viewed or edited

datacontract.name: SessionMessageServerToClient
datacontract.description: This structure defines all possible messages that may be sent from server to client over WebSocket

member.name: sessionInfo
member.description: This message is sent by server once to inform about the current session

member.name: dataChange
member.description: This message is sent by server to inform about an object that was changed or created

member.name: featureConcurrency
member.description: This message is sent by server to inform about other users being on the same feature (tab) of an object

member.name: accessConcurrency
member.description: This message is sent by server to inform about other users viewing or editing the same object

datacontract.name: WorkItem
datacontract.description: Describes a work item with basic information

member.name: duration
member.description: The effort that has to be done, measured in time

member.name: start
member.description: The point in time when work will start

member.name: finish
member.description: The point in time when work should be done

datacontract.name: ProjectWorkItemConstraint
datacontract.description: Describes a dependency between two project phases

member.name: fromPhaseId
member.description: The source phase's ID

member.name: toPhaseId
member.description: The destination phase's ID

member.name: dependencyType
member.description: The kind of dependency

member.name: minDistance
member.description: The minimal distance between the two connecting points, null if not specified

member.name: maxDistance
member.description: The minimal distance between the two connecting points, null if not specified

enumcontract.name: ProjectWorkItemConstraintType
enumcontract.description: Describes the kind of work item dependency (i.e. the points where the dependency connects to the phases)

value.description: The destination phase may start at or after the start of the source phase
The destination phase may end at or after the start of the source phase
The destination phase may start at or after the end of the source phase
The destination phase may end at or after the end of the source phase
Source phase and destination phase are the result of a splitting operation - the destination phase may start at or after the end of the source phase

datacontract.name: ProjectWorkItemRemainingEfforts
datacontract.description: Describes the progress / earned value history of a project work item

member.name: timeline
member.description: The different corrections on different days

datacontract.name: ProjectWorkItemRemainingEffort
datacontract.description: Describes an element in a progress / earned value history of a project work item

member.name: remainingEffort
member.description: The remaining effort, if any

member.name: remainingEffortSpecified
member.description: The remaining effort that was originally specified, if any

member.name: progressSpecified
member.description: The progress that was specified (range 0-100), if any

member.name: remark
member.description: A remark that describes how the progress or remaining value was estimated

simpleType.example: Although we have no clue, it seems that we've made progress

member.name: modifiedAt
member.description: The point in time when the object was modified

member.name: modifiedBy
member.description: User ID with full name (if any) of the user that modified this object

datacontract.name: ProjectWorkItemRemainingEffortWithOverrides
datacontract.description: Describes an element in a progress / earned value history of a project work item and contains overridden items

member.name: at
member.description: The day when the earned value or remaining time was set

member.name: overidden
member.description: The items that were overridden by later corrections with same "at" value

datacontract.name: ReferenceWithLinkInfo
datacontract.description: Information about a resource and the link to that resource (often used to list ancestors and their relation)

member.name: linkType
member.description: the type of link

member.name: linkId
member.description: the ID of the link

member.name: linkValidityStart
member.description: the first day of validity

member.name: linkValidityUntil
member.description: the first day without validity

datacontract.name: ItemWithAncestors
datacontract.description: An item with its ancestor references

member.name: ancestors
member.description: the ancestor references

datacontract.name: AbsenceType
datacontract.description: A type of absence for resources

member.name: availabilityPercentage
member.description: The percentage of availability for work (0 for absent, 100 for full availability)

member.name: presencePercentage
member.description: The percentage of physical presence at office (0 for absent, 100 for full presence)

member.name: category
member.description: Some obscure value affecting the grouping of absences on the client (ask the client team about details)

datacontract.name: Resource
datacontract.description: A resource (an entity that may be allocated to projects and work items)

member.name: eMail
member.description: the e-Mail address of a resource (this information may be used for single sign on)

datacontract.name: ResourceGroup
datacontract.description: A resource group (HRM, KSM, ...)

member.name: name
member.description: the name in the user's language

member.name: description
member.description: a short description in the user's language

member.name: imageUrl
member.description: an icon for the resource group

member.name: rootResource
member.description: the root resource of the group

enumcontract.name: ResourceKind
enumcontract.description: A resource kind, grouping different resource types with same semantics

value.description: infrastructural resources like buildings or machines
a resource that is a human being

datacontract.name: ResourceLinkType
datacontract.description: A resource link type

member.name: fromResourceTypeId
member.description: the ID of the source resource's type

member.name: toResourceTypeId
member.description: the ID of the destination resource's type

member.name: name
member.description: the name of the resource link type in the user's language

simpleType.example: Name of this resource link type.

member.name: nameReverse
member.description: the reverse name of the resource type in the user's language

simpleType.example: Backwards name of this resource link type.

member.name: description
member.description: A descriptive text about the object, may contain HTML

member.name: iconRef
member.description: value for HTML attribute image/@src, Examples: "/images/.../....png" for images on the server, "data:image/png;base64,[base64data]" for inline data

member.name: color
member.description: A color or any identifier of a color

member.name: isHard
member.description: flag to indicate a hard link (a link that builds the resource tree structure)

member.name: targetObjectNeedsParentPermission
member.description: require permission of source resource if trying to access target resource

member.name: targetObjectInheritRelations
member.description: inherit relations of source resource if trying to access target resource

member.name: implicitRelationId
member.description: if not null, PQFORCE has created a corresponding relation type

datacontract.name: ResourceType
datacontract.description: A resource type

member.name: name
member.description: the name of the resource type in the user's language

member.name: resourceGroupeId
member.description: the group this resource type belongs to

member.name: costsTypeId
member.description: the costs type that efforts of such resources will be accounted for

member.name: resourceKind
member.description: the kind of resource (semantics)

datacontract.name: ResourceShift
datacontract.description: Defines a worktime shift for a resource.

member.name: name
member.description: the name of the shift in the user's language

member.name: description
member.description: a short description in the user's language

member.name: imageUrl
member.description: an icon

member.name: color
member.description: a color

member.name: duration
member.description: the effective duration of the shift (may not match beg until end)

member.name: begTime
member.description: the time of day the shift starts (duration since midnight)

member.name: endTime
member.description: the time of day the shift ends (duration since midnight)

datacontract.name: Presence
datacontract.description: A resource presence as part of its worktime model

member.name: presence
member.description: a flag indicating whether a resource is normally present

member.name: duration
member.description: the duration if present

datacontract.name: Model
datacontract.description: Presences for a specific shift

member.name: shift
member.description: the shift

member.name: presencePerDay
member.description: an array containing the presences for each weekday (always 7 elements, mon - sun)

datacontract.name: Availability
datacontract.description: Availability model of a resource

member.name: definedOn
member.description: A reference to indicate the place in the resource tree where this object belongs to (read-only)

member.name: inheritFromParent
member.description: a flag indicating that model has to be inherited from parent (ignored if root resource)

member.name: inheritedFrom
member.description: A reference to indicate the resource tree where the model has been inherited from (read-only)

member.name: validAfter
member.description: the first day of validity

member.name: holidayLocaleId
member.description: the locale for the holidays (in Switzerland, each Kanton has its own holidays - and yes, Zug has a lot of them)

member.name: models
member.description: the standard availabilities for each shift on each weekday

member.name: basicLoadPercent
member.description: the basic load of resource (the percentage of time that has to be spent for other things than projects, i.e. administrative tasks)

member.name: costPerHour
member.description: the costs per hour for a resource (needed to trnsform efforts into costs)

member.name: costCurrency
member.description: the currency for the costs

member.name: description
member.description: a short description of the availability model

member.name: ftePercent
member.description: the amount of full time equivalents that a resource counts for (0 for groups, 100 for single resources)

member.name: standardAvails
member.description: the standard availabilities per day (may differ from the sum of shift availabilities, always 7 elements, mon - sun)

datacontract.name: AvailabilitiesByResource
datacontract.description: Availabilities by resource (for bulk requests)

member.name: resource
member.description: A reference to a resource

member.name: availabilities
member.description: The availabilities of the resource

enumcontract.name: CalendarFileFormat
enumcontract.description: Calendar format for holiday import

datacontract.name: Holiday
datacontract.description: Describes a holiday for resources (assigned to a date and a shift)

member.name: date
member.description: The day of the holiday

member.name: shiftId
member.description: The ID of the shift that is affected

member.name: name
member.description: The name of the holiday in the user's language

datacontract.name: ResourceGroupStandardWorktime
datacontract.description: Describes the standard worktime of a resource group

member.name: id
member.description: The ID of the resource group

member.name: timePerWeek
member.description: the time per week that resources work

member.name: daysPerWeek
member.description: the days per week that resources work

datacontract.name: WorkdayMapping
datacontract.description: Maps a workday scheme to weekdays or vice versa

member.name: resource
member.description: a reference to the resource

member.name: referenceDay
member.description: the 0-reference day

member.name: mapping
member.description: the mapping (distance to reference date in days)

datacontract.name: ThirdPartyReference
datacontract.description: Describes a relation between a PQFORCE object and any object in a third party system including some properties of the third party's object

member.name: foreignName
member.description: The name of the third party's object

member.name: foreignCode
member.description: The code of the third party's object (often identical with its ID)

member.name: foreignDescription
member.description: The description of the third party's object

member.name: foreignImageUrl
member.description: The icon of the third party's object

datacontract.name: ThirdPartyReferenceAssignment
datacontract.description: Defines a relation between a PQFORCE object and any object in a third party system

member.name: foreignKey
member.description: The ID of the third party system's object

member.name: pqforceId
member.description: The ID of the object in PQFORCE (usually a UUID)

datacontract.name: ThirdPartyReferenceType
datacontract.description: Describes which type of PQFORCE objects is linked to third party objects

member.name: typeId
member.description: The PQFORCE type which has linked objects

member.name: maxCount
member.description: Indicates a limitation to how many foreign objects a PQFORCE object may be linked. NULL indicates that there's no limitation

datacontract.name: ThirdPartyReferenceWithOwnData

member.description: The code of PQFORCE's object

member.name: pqforceDescription
member.description: The description of PQFORCE's object

member.name: pqforceImageUrl
member.description: The icon of PQFORCE's object

member.name: additionalData
member.description: Additional text data that is not interpreted by PQFORCE, but may be used by an agent / interface system to store important information
